query: Please assist in devising a week-long travel plan, beginning in Jacksonville and venturing through 3 distinct cities in Massachusetts from March 22nd to March 28th, 2022. The budget for this solo journey is set at $6,600.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Jacksonville to Martha's Vineyard, duration: 18 hours 51 mins, distance: 1,927 km, cost: 96
plan.attraction: Martha's Vineyard Museum; East Chop Lighthouse; Vincent House Museum; Edgartown Harbor Lighthouse;
Aquinnah Cliffs Overlook; Gay Head Light; Ocean Park; Wasque Point Wildlife Management Area;
plan.dinner: The Carnegie | Vineyard Preservation Trust, Martha's Vineyard

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Martha's Vineyard to Hyannis, duration: 2 hours 7 mins, distance: 49.5 km, cost: 2
plan.attraction: John F. Kennedy Hyannis Museum; Cape Cod Maritime Museum; John F. Kennedy Memorial; Veterans Memorial Park;
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom at the heart of Harlem, Hyannis

plan.attraction: Cape Codder Water Park; Kalmus Park Beach; Walkway to the Sea; Whydah Pirate Museum;
plan.accommodation: Sunny bedroom at the heart of Harlem, Hyannis

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Hyannis to Nantucket, duration: 2 hours 17 mins, distance: 47.0 km, cost: 2
plan.attraction: Whaling Museum; Great Point Lighthouse; Nantucket Shipwreck and Life Saving Museum; Great Point Beach;
plan.accommodation: Gorgeous Apartment in a Historic Brownstone, Nantucket

plan.breakfast: Charan Singh Kulfi & Kala Khatta, Nantucket
plan.attraction: Coskata-Coatue Wildlife Refuge Gatehouse; Salt Marsh Way Beach; 'Sconset Bluff Walk; Brant Point Lighthouse;
plan.accommodation: Gorgeous Apartment in a Historic Brownstone, Nantucket

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Nantucket to Jacksonville, duration: 20 hours 9 mins, distance: 1,967 km, cost: 98
